title: El diamante en bruto del Ibex que suma un 205% desde 2021 y gusta a todos
summary: Una de las compañías del Ibex más alcistas este año brilla en los últimos cinco ejercicios, con una revalorización del 205% desde el inicio de 2021. Gusta a todos los analistas que le siguen y creen que puede seguir al alza para dar alegrías a medio plazo. Leer

title: El Ibex vuelve a consolidar niveles
summary: Los mercados siguen encontrando obstáculos que atenazan sus subidas. La nueva espiral de ataques de EEUU sobre Irán y la subida de tipos en Corea mantienen en guardia a los inversores. title: La Princesa Leonor pide acompañar y cuidar el "talento joven" y elogia a los docentes
summary: El Rey, durante la entrega de los Premios Princesa de Girona: "Progresar juntos es lo único que tiene sentido". Leer

title: COMPARE: Which European countries allow assisted dying?
summary: After France adopted a bill to allow assisted dying on Wednesday, here's a look at which European countries already authorise the terminally ill to end their lives.

title: 'Drastic change': Crowds cross Gibraltar-Spain frontier as border controls vanish
summary: A steady stream of pedestrians and vehicles crossed the border between Spain and Gibraltar on Wednesday as an agreement allowing free movement across the frontier came into force.

title: Spain to face Argentina in World Cup final after Messi-led comeback sinks England
summary: Reigning champions Argentina came from behind to beat England 2-1 on Wednesday and reach their second World Cup final in a row, where they will face Spain.

title: EU seeks Trump tariff exemptions on wine and cheese
summary: The EU has asked the US for tariff exemptions on more products, a spokesman said on Wednesday, including cheese and wine.

title: Spain's PM says Gibraltar border removal closes 'open wound'
summary: The lifting of border controls between Spain and Gibraltar has closed "an open wound", Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez said Wednesday as an agreement allowing free movement across the frontier came into force.

title: Spain's ex-PM unrepentant about France football team remark
summary: Spain's former prime minister Mariano Rajoy has defended himself with sarcasm rather than an apology after earlier comments saying France's national football team had "no French players" sparked an outcry.

title: LATEST: EES passport checks will not be fully implemented at Dover and Eurotunnel this summer
summary: As European ports and airports struggle to cope with the full rollout of the EU's new biometric passport checks, the Port of Dover and Eurotunnel have confirmed to The Local that full checks will not be rolled out until the end of the peak summer period.

title: ¡Viva! Delirium in Madrid as Spain reach World Cup final
summary: Roars of joy and honking car horns reverberated through Madrid on Tuesday as Spaniards celebrated their team overcoming France and moving to the cusp of a second World Cup crown.
